chapter.title: GBFS data (applicable for every JSON data)

section.title: Introduction to GBFS
section.para: GBFS (General Bikeshare Feed Specification) is a data format that is used to provide information about bike-sharing systems. It is a standardized way to share data about the status of a bike-sharing system. This data is used by many applications to provide information to users about the availability of bikes and docks.
The GBFS data is provided in JSON format. It is composed of several files that contain information about the system, the stations, the status of the stations, the availability of bikes, etc.

chapter.para: We will, for our examples, use data from STAR which is the Rennes' public transport company. This data is protected by ODbL (Open Database License)\cite{SourceSTAR}.
